title: YO25 4RZ, Annyalla Chicks (UK) Broiler Breeders Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/SP3627SY/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Annyalla Chicks (UK) Broiler Breeders Limited   Installation name: Harpham Lane Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/SP3627SY/A001   "
